description_long: This humanoid robot features a robust, armored exterior with a predominantly metallic build, characterized by broad shoulders, thick limbs, and a domed torso. The front displays a large, black, visor-like surface, possibly functioning as a sensor or display, flanked by geometric markings and numeric decals. Its arms end in large, claw-like manipulators, and the legs are wide and sturdy, designed for stability and heavy-duty movement. The back is equipped with mechanical tubing and vent-like structures, suggesting cooling or power distribution systems. The color palette consists of muted greens, grays, and maroon, giving it a utilitarian, industrial appearance. The overall design is functional and imposing, suitable for urban environments requiring strength and resilience.
description: A heavily armored, industrial humanoid robot with a large black visor, clawed hands, and reinforced limbs, finished in muted green, gray, and maroon tones.
description_view_0: Front view shows the large black visor, numeric decals, and symmetrical, broad shoulders with clawed hands extended.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the domed torso, arm articulation, and the layered armor plating along the limbs.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals mechanical tubing, vent-like structures, and the robust, reinforced back and legs.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the arm and leg structure, as well as the side profile of the visor and chest.
attribute_pose: Standing upright with both arms slightly bent at the elbows and legs apart for stability; head and torso facing forward.
attribute_clothing_style: No clothing; exterior consists of integrated armored panels and mechanical coverings in industrial style.
attribute_facial_features: No traditional facial features; the face area is a large, black, visor-like surface with no visible eyes, mouth, or nose.
attribute_limb_articulation: Arms and legs have visible hinge and rotary joints at shoulders, elbows, hips, and knees; hands are claw-like with limited articulation; limbs appear rigid and robust.
attribute_presence_of_sensors: Possible sensor array behind the black visor on the front of the head; no other visible sensors.
